name: Elaine's Brisket
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the brisket in a roaster pan without the lid.
2. Sear on high heat using an oven set to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Turn the brisket after about 15 minutes.
4. Pour the ingredients over the brisket.
5. Cover the pan with a lid or foil.
6. Pour ginger ale halfway up in the pot (do not cover the meat completely).
7. Cook at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 2-1/2 hours covered.
Note: This roast comes out with a barbecue flavor and seems to be everyone's favorite. It is easy and a no-fail recipe.
